reviews.review_description: Ｆｅａｒｉｎｇ 𝘨𝘰𝘳𝘪𝘓𝘓𝘢 ᶦˢ 𝔞 ρҽαƙ 𝚐𝚊𝚖𝚎 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝓊𝓃𝒻𝑜𝓇𝓉𝓊𝓃𝒶𝓉𝑒𝐿𝓎 𝑔𝑜𝑟𝑖𝐿𝐿𝑎 t̆̈ă̈ğ̈ բҽαɾíղց 𝖌𝖔𝖗𝖎𝕷𝕷𝖆 ᴅᴏᴡɴ αη∂ ꫀׁׁׅܻׅ݊᥎ׁׅꫀׁׅܻ݊Րׁׅᨮׁׅ֮֮ϐׁᨵׁׅׅժׁׅ݊ᨮׁׅ֮ 𝔀𝓮𝓻𝓮 sᥲძ 𝒻ₑₐᵣᵢₙ𝓰 𝙜𝙤𝙧𝙞𝙇𝙇𝙖 𝗴𝗼𝘁 å 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝕒𝕡𝕡 ᗩᑎᗪ 𝓉𝒽𝒶𝓉 𝔥𝔞𝔡  tׁׅᨵׁׅׅᝯׁ֒ᧁׁꫀׁׅܻ݊tׁׅ ₗₒₜₛ 𝑜𝑓 𝓾𝓹𝓭𝓪𝓽𝓮𝓢 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝖋𝖊𝖆𝖗𝖎𝖓𝖌 𝙜𝙤𝙧𝙞𝙇𝙇𝙖 𝐢𝐒 ᵃ 𝔤𝔯𝔢𝔞𝔯𝔱 ɯαყ Եօ ցҽԵ ᥡ᥆ᥙr ᖴᑌᑎ ᴀɴᴅ 𝚕𝚊𝚞𝚐𝚑 𝚊𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 p̆̈ĕ̈ŏ̈p̆̈l̆̈ĕ̈ ѕ¢яєαмιηg αη∂ ｒｉｐ 𝖿𝖾𝖺𝗋𝗂𝗇𝗀 gorilla🙁

This will probably be the last rating. This game man this game used to be so peak wait no it was peak and always would’ve been if the game want copyrighted. The memory’s this game holded like the time me and randoms dingdong ditched spider the good ol days. Or the time we summoned the boiled one and ran for our lives. Or running away from grandpa in the hospital. Being stalked by the stalker. Screaming in the lobby about sum “guys let’s summon (put name here)” or “let’s go to liminal/dreamcore/backrooms. Not realising we weren’t gonna make it out. The times your team slowly died until it was u. Or even reaching the end just to be stranded on an island with just an endless ocean with one light house. Ty e time you summoned tiptoe not knowing it would be your last. This game held so many memory’s. You don’t miss old fearing gorilla… you miss being younger making friends along the way not realising you would never see them again.

this game has brought me so much joy so much nostalgic i love this game it should have millions of players but sadly nobody really plays it i and nobody really wants to play with me i keep on asking my friends it's a beautiful and a great game

This game was the best, and it left so soon, I remember staying up late at night with my friends screaming and laughing our butts off it was so fun with friends no other game will be like this new game is good and all it’s just not as good as OG. I’m gonna miss this game so much thank you you fearing gorilla for being a part of my childhood hope one day I could play OG again a song for me goodbye OG fearing gorilla you will be missed and we love you.

My name is snipeslotVR, and im a content creator on tiktok. My videos are usually about horror games, and fearing gorilla was a game i would mention a lot.  I Remember the times before gorilla tag sued it. When candyland was still here  and i would tell my friends to hop on afterschool  and join me in  or teaching new players how to do tracking glitch and beating dreamcore. It was a blast i started from being terrified of the wendigo to becoming a popular tiktoker thanks to this game, and i know it has a new version, but it will never be the same as the og. Goodbye.
To the four owners, thank you. This game has been on my side for the longest.This game is the only reason i have friends. But i guess it is time to let go. I just want to say, Thank You.Bye🥲

reviews.review_title: It’s been a good year with you
reviews.review_description: Ty so much for helping me getting over my moms death

reviews.review_title: Best vr horror game with Gtag locomotion
reviews.review_description: Honestly the best horror game to play especially with friends, there’s clearly been so much time and effort put into this game. You can do summons, visit the back rooms, go to dream core and so much more. Currently the game is down because of using Gtag assets but there’s a revamp coming soon  which I can’t wait for. But at its current state it’s a 10/10 game for sure.
This game is so fun, I love the monsters. 😄
Man the revamp got shutdown fearing gorilla you will be Remeberd but it’s gonna be back in a month or 2 o stay tuned!

Today was technically my first day playing this game. I went into the game and forgot that i had to change my name since i thought i already played it before (i didnt) so i went and ran around but apparently there was a moderator in my server and he didnt give me a warning or anything he just said “oh your name isn’t changed? sorry bro im gonna have to ban you for that”. If you ( the devs ) want to have a decent moderation system at least don’t automatically ban people for something they forget to do.

developer_response.body: Thank you for telling me this! There'll be a talk with staff, I thought they only were banning people when they were refusing. Thanks!

This game was peak 
When it was made

It was so fun and really funny to sometimes one time we brought dg up to city and the time me and my friends summoned error in the mines. This would probably be the last review of the game but hey one day maybe the revamped version would even be funnier so go play the revamp!

NEVERMIND just found out servers are down 


Everytime I load the game up I get hit with an orange screen on the computer saying, “FAILED TO AUTHENTICATE WITH MOTHERSHIP
Rearon: The build you are currently on is not up to date with the mothership backend. We can not authenticate you since the build you are on is not expected in the backend. Make sure you are up to date and report this to the developers if you are, we might have forgetton to update the expected verzion.” This just now started happening after I updated the game. This is one of the first problems I’ve came across in this game, keep up the good work.

i was playing this game and i accidentally fell out of the map into this weird... tunnel. i whent back and forth through it and i saw some text saying something.  i forgot what it said. but when i was exploring the  place that loaded in with the map i saw a something called obunga. i think it's called that. but this weird 2D png quickly ran over to me and i got kicked from the game. (this game is still amazingly good and i discovered a bug that made the servers go faster but won't spoil it. 5 stars.)

I am seeing some negative reviews, but i think opposite.

Fearing Gorilla looks very well made and had a lot of effort into creating a game like this. Many things about this game is definitely 5 stars. Community is fairly nice compared to Gorilla Tag, players willingly telling people what to do nicely. Maps are fun and unique. Overall, if you're interested in fun multiplayer VR horror games, this is a great one to check out. Very fun and enjoyable to play with friends or random players like you.

The only game I am ok with having Gtag assets in is this game. It does everything so well, and I can say I was addicted for DAYS. I would recommend changing some assets so you are not directly infringing copywrite, but you can still definitely get the same vibe from using your own assets.

Fearing gorilla is a great game! The game is great quality but the reason I gave only 4 stars is because I was messing around with my friends and we where trying to get to dream core through forest and ended up finding a bug in the game! Basically when you are on saddle and let go to get off most of the time you get flung to oblivion. But overall great game and I recommend playing with friends! I started playing fearing gorilla because I heard about it on youTube and at first I hated all of it (mostly because I couldn't run away from IT)but then once I started playing more and more I started to love it. But now I can't play until the revamp is finally done. So 5 STARS!
Heya snowy! I’ve never played fearing gorilla yet I’ve seen a few videos and I can’t wait for the revamp to come out. Keep up the great work and Im so happy to be able to play today. Thank you!     ￼

Honestly, the game is absolutely incredible. The mechanics are smooth and well-designed, the monsters are unique and exciting, and every map feels creative and full of detail. You can really see the amount of work and imagination that went into building this world. I’ve never played a game quite like this before — it’s rare to find something that stands out so much. From the gameplay to the atmosphere, everything feels polished and immersive. It truly deserves its 5 stars.

This game is absolutely one of my favorites, great monsters and summonings. Dang, even good backrooms/Dreamcore levels. Personally, I'd rather play this than actual gorilla tag!

This game is way too goated to not recommend to a friend, you can summon monsters and by far the best part in my opinion, is going into the big volcano, I haven't fully explored much yet but I'll definitely play again. 10/10, must play, one thing I dont like though when you die you just crash, like you get kicked and pretty annoying when the one kid can't run away from the lollipop guy. SOOOOO MUCH FUN!!! Honestly this is the BEST gtag fan horror game I have ever played. But the only reason I gave it a 4 star is because I got banned for no reason. I was in a public lobby summoning angel, right as we did a mod joined. And when it ended I ran to leaderboard because he said he was going to ban me. He said he was because I was the one who summoned it, even though there were eight other people doing it. He blamed me, I got banned. I would really like to speak to a dev, but fun game overall. I'm also excited for the revamp but sad I can't play. And the mods name was like furry boy or something I just know they had fur in their name.
Like the game but cant play due to the revamp im done waiting
